pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.1.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading to 3.2.x is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target Java 21 to utilize new language features and ensure runtime compatibility with the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Dependencies BOM to a version compatible with Spring Boot 3.2.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2022.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.2.x; using an incompatible BOM causes dependency resolution conflicts or runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Azure Dependencies BOM to a version compatible with Spring Boot 3.2.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Cloud Azure versions may have incompatibilities with the newer Spring Boot 3.2 stack or lack Java 21 support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Azure Functions Maven Plugin to a version supporting Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the Azure Functions plugin may fail to build or run functions on Java 21 due to missing support or bugs.
